Hot Item Alert, the highly anticipated new Papillon Trunk Handbag from overseas channels has arrived. This bag is embellished with metal rivets and S-lock hooks, featuring a traditional new style! The semi-rigid baguette structure is convenient for hand-holding, crossbody, or shoulder carrying.

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions 19-9-9CM
Hot Item Alert, the highly anticipated new Papillon Trunk Handbag from overseas channels has arrived. This bag is embellished with metal rivets and S-lock hooks, featuring a traditional new style! The semi-rigid baguette structure is convenient for hand-holding, crossbody, or shoulder carrying.

items.name_en: Dimensions: 22.5 x 21 x 7cm
items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 22.5 x 21 x 7cm
2024 Spring/Summer Runway Collection Shipment! Hong Kong Channel Order, Hong Kong Direct Mail Available! Around Me Round Cake Handbag, M47117 Monogram. This handbag reinterprets the brand's classic LV Circle logo with its unique Monogram coated canvas, appearing in a brand-new look. This round handbag features a one-piece handle that creates a simple and elegant appearance, and its compact structure exudes a trendy vibe. The capacity is sufficient to meet your daily needs, perfectly matching your various styles whether carried on the shoulder or in hand.

items.name_en: Dimensions: 25×15×5 cm
items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 25×15×5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Shipment! 2024 Latest LV Pea Bean Mother & Child Bag, fashion is a cycle, a style from 20 years ago has been re-released. This design point: one shoulder strap solves the need, can be crossbody or underarm, changing carrying methods anytime and anywhere, suitable for more occasions! Simple and convenient!
The side design adds fashion sense while being practical, paying tribute to LV's classic travel trunk! The special padded wide leather adds comfort to the shoulder and a relaxed casual feel! Suitable for daily commute or travel. Plus, the capacity of this bag is not to be underestimated, it is sure to turn heads 🥰

This Dopp Kit wash bag is crafted from fine-grain Taurillon Monogram leather, allowing you to carry toiletries and other personal items elegantly. The bag features a spacious capacity, double zipper closure, and a washable lining, combining style and practicality. This accessory makes a thoughtful gift and perfectly complements any travel bag.
Dimensions: 28 x 15 x 16.5 cm
